data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security to user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Offers SMS, app-based, or hardware key options for 2FA.

data.title: Advanced Encryption Standards
data.description: Encrypts data both at rest and during transmission.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors for and mitigates security threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: AI and machine learning-based systems to detect anomalies and potential attacks.

data.title: Security Patches
data.description: Regular updates are applied to fix known vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management system to deploy updates globally.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages external security researchers to find and report vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Incentive program that pays for valid vulnerability reports.
